channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bike, 20th June
item.description:

item.title: Fly tipping again at Genesta Road - Mayplace Lane corner, 20th June
item.description:
Photo taken 20th June 2026. Happens all the time; if Greenwich want to catch fly tippers this is the place to install cameras.

item.title: Plant bed outside Brick Lane Bagel, 20th June
item.description:
Please weed and replenish bark chip. Please add more plants in next planting season.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53, High Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Going toward North on corner of Shelton St.& Endell St. outside of Tesco Express near to last residency parking bay., 20th June
item.description:
The photo I downloaded was taken in 2023 - a maple tree which Camden Council planted for a "good neighbour " - over three years I have stopped 2-3 lorries from driving into it, taped back on a branch which was snapped off. This week very sad sight of this young tree leaning way over , the supports/ stakes ( as in photo) removed. Just seen a v. large lorry turning left near to that corner - where incidentally the road sign is leaning in the opposite direction. It truly wins the Willy Wonker street corner prize in Central London. It maybe not the best place for it so in that case can it be replanted in a quieter street ? Or put the 2 posts back around it - but I fear someone took the 2 original ones out ! There is a lovely Wine Business across the road from all of this - they must blame their view on the wine ! But seriously something really needs to be done for this tree as it's a very sad sight at present. I hope you can help as it needs a support.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Endell Street, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing wooden rail, 20th June
item.description:
Please see the photo.

item.title: Fly tipping again!, 20th June
item.description:
Gazebo frame and black bags fly tipped by the same perpetrator on Coleman road with Wells Way, who lives on 121 Wells Way Please tackle the issue from the source… this happens every week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Coleman Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bell bollard, 20th June
item.description:
As a result of vehicles hitting this bollard repeatedly, we raised a concern and 2 yellow strips were affixed to make it more visible especially for HGVs. The bottom strip is now missing and the top one is coming undone in places. It would be preferable for the bollard to be painted in appropriate yellow paint. Can this be done? Otherwise please replace and affix reflective strips. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Royal Parade, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins Graffiti, 20th June
item.description:
Thank you!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Newington Causeway, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins and recycling, 20th June
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Institute Place, Hackney, London
